mapper.select:
select
from cer_sample_test_tb where project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
insert into cer_sample_test_tb(id,project_id,sub_project_id, vector_task_id,project_code,acceptor_material, sub_project_code,vector_task_code,plasmid_name, transform_code,sample_code,apply_time, apply_user_id,apply_user_name, sample_time,sample_remark,sample_generation, sample_user_name,sample_user_id, test_identify_primer,test_method,test_edit_type, test_no_trans_identity_primer,test_is_gene_modify_positive,test_if_fixed_point, test_if_copy_insert,test_fixed_point_type,test_donor_residue_info, test_insertion_site,test_elisa_result,test_qbzr_seq, test_edit_residue_info,test_user_id, test_user_name,test_time,check_user_name, check_user_id,check_result, create_time,update_time,apply_no,identify_primer,unique_code,clone_sample_code) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.projectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.subProjectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.vectorTaskId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.acceptorMaterial,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plasmidName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.transformCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.applyUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.applyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleGeneration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sampleUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.testIdentifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testEditType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testNoTransIdentityPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIsGeneModifyPositive,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIfFixedPoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testIfCopyInsert,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testFixedPointType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testDonorResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testInsertionSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testElisaResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testQbzrSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testEditResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.testUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.checkUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.checkUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.identifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.uniqueCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.cloneSampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from cer_sample_test_tb where vector_task_id = #{vectorTaskId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

select
from cer_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id asc

select a.sample_code as sampleCode from (select sample_code from cer_sample_test_tb where project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and LENGTH(sample_code) = 4 union select sample_code from cer_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as a order by sampleCode desc LIMIT 1
select count(*) from cer_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and check_result is not null
select count(*) from cer_sample_test_tb
select count(*) as countNum, date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') as sampleMonth from cer_sample_test_tb where date_format(create_time, '%Y') = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY sampleMonth

select
from cer_sample_test_tb where unique_code = #{uniqueCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select check_result as checkResult, count(*) as countNum from cer_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by check_result

select
from cer_sample_test_tb where sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select
from cer_sample_test_tb where transform_code = #{transformCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select
from cer_sample_test_tb where sample_code like CONCAT('%',#{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
